name: InfScroll

unions.name: Config
cases: { loadMore : model -> msg, msgWrapper : Msg -> msg, itemView : item -> Html msg, loadingIndicator : Html msg, hasMore : model -> Bool }

values.name: update

values.type: Config model item msg -> model -> Msg -> ( model, Cmd msg )

values.name: view
values.comment: Handle rendering of the InfScroll component.
values.type: Config model item msg -> model -> List item -> Html msg
